mapper.select: SELECT ID, SHIPVOYAGE_ID, SHIPVOYAGE_ITEM_ID, SCN, SHIP_NAME, CARGO_INFO_NO, CARGO_OWNER_ID, CARGO_OWNER_NAME, CARGO_AGENT_ID, CARGO_AGENT_NAME, CARGO_CODE, CARGO_NAME, TRADE_TYPE, PACKING_CODE, PACKING_NAME, COMPANY_ID, COMPANY_NAME, PARENT_ID, ROOT_ID, QUANTITY, TON, RIGHTS_QUANTITY, SURPLUS_RIGHTS_QUANTITY, IS_CLEAR, CLEAR_BY, CLEAR_BY_NAME, CLEAR_DATE, CREATE_BY, CREATE_BY_NAME, CREATE_TIME, UPDATE_BY, UPDATE_BY_NAME, UPDATE_TIME, SOURCE, STATEMENT_STATUS_CODE, STATEMENT_STATUS_NAME, TRUST_ID, CONTRACT_ITEM_ID, CONTRACT_CODE, VOYAGE, STORAGE_DATE, RESIDUE_STORAGE, TRANSFER_DATE, YSPHH, JSZT, TOS_CARGO_ID, CDH, IS_TOS, MIX_FREE_STORAGE_DAYS, REAL_CLEAR_DATE FROM T_BUS_CARGO_INFO WHERE ID = #{id,jdbcType=BIGINT}

SELECT ID, SHIPVOYAGE_ID, SHIPVOYAGE_ITEM_ID, SCN, SHIP_NAME, CARGO_INFO_NO, CARGO_OWNER_ID, CARGO_OWNER_NAME, CARGO_AGENT_ID, CARGO_AGENT_NAME, CARGO_CODE, CARGO_NAME, TRADE_TYPE, PACKING_CODE, PACKING_NAME, COMPANY_ID, COMPANY_NAME, PARENT_ID, ROOT_ID, QUANTITY, TON, RIGHTS_QUANTITY, SURPLUS_RIGHTS_QUANTITY, IS_CLEAR, CLEAR_BY, CLEAR_BY_NAME, CLEAR_DATE, CREATE_BY, CREATE_BY_NAME, CREATE_TIME, UPDATE_BY, UPDATE_BY_NAME, UPDATE_TIME, SOURCE, STATEMENT_STATUS_CODE, STATEMENT_STATUS_NAME, TRUST_ID, CONTRACT_ITEM_ID, CONTRACT_CODE, VOYAGE, STORAGE_DATE, RESIDUE_STORAGE, TRANSFER_DATE, ID, SHIPVOYAGE_ID, SHIPVOYAGE_ITEM_ID, SCN, SHIP_NAME, CARGO_INFO_NO, CARGO_OWNER_ID, CARGO_OWNER_NAME, CARGO_AGENT_ID, CARGO_AGENT_NAME, CARGO_CODE, CARGO_NAME, TRADE_TYPE, PACKING_CODE, PACKING_NAME, COMPANY_ID, COMPANY_NAME, PARENT_ID, ROOT_ID, QUANTITY, TON, RIGHTS_QUANTITY, SURPLUS_RIGHTS_QUANTITY, IS_CLEAR, CLEAR_BY, CLEAR_BY_NAME, CLEAR_DATE, CREATE_BY, CREATE_BY_NAME, CREATE_TIME, UPDATE_BY, UPDATE_BY_NAME, UPDATE_TIME, SOURCE, STATEMENT_STATUS_CODE, STATEMENT_STATUS_NAME, TRUST_ID, CONTRACT_ITEM_ID, CONTRACT_CODE, VOYAGE, STORAGE_DATE, RESIDUE_STORAGE FROM T_BUS_CARGO_INFO WHERE PARENT_ID = #{parentId,jdbcType=BIGINT}

SELECT TO_DATE(TO_CHAR(TBCMR.MIX_TIME, 'YYYY-MM-DD'), 'YYYY-MM-DD') "mixDate", SUM(TBCMD.MIX_WEIGHT) "mixWeight" FROM T_BUS_CARGO_MIX_RECORD TBCMR JOIN T_BUS_CARGO_MIX_DETAIL TBCMD ON TBCMR.ID = TBCMD.MIX_RECORD_ID WHERE TBCMD.CARGO_INFO_ID = #{cargoInfoId,jdbcType=BIGINT} GROUP BY TO_DATE(TO_CHAR(TBCMR.MIX_TIME, 'YYYY-MM-DD'), 'YYYY-MM-DD')

SELECT TBC.ID, TBC.CONTACT_NO "CONTRACT_NO", TBCR.ID "CONTRACT_RATE_ID", TBCR.FREE_STORAGE_DAYS, TBCR.RATE, TBCR.TAX, SFB.FILE_ID FROM T_BUS_CARGO_INFO TBCI LEFT JOIN (SELECT TEMP.CARGO_INFO_ID, MIN(TEMP.WEIGH_OUT_DT) WEIGH_OUT_DT FROM (SELECT TEMP.CARGO_INFO_ID, VWI.WEIGH_OUT_DT FROM (SELECT TBTC.BUSINESS_NO, TBTC.CARGO_INFO_ID FROM T_BUS_TRUST_CARGO TBTC JOIN T_BUS_TRUST TBT ON TBTC.TRUST_ID = TBT.ID AND TBT.TYPE IN ('集港', '拆箱集港')) TEMP JOIN V_WEIGHT_INFO VWI ON VWI.IS_OLD = '否' AND TEMP.BUSINESS_NO = VWI.PLAN_NO UNION ALL SELECT TO_NUMBER(VWI2.CARGO_INFO_ID), VWI2.WEIGH_OUT_DT FROM V_WEIGHT_INFO VWI2 WHERE VWI2.IS_OLD = '是' AND VWI2.PLAN_TYPE IN ('集港', '拆箱集港')) TEMP GROUP BY TEMP.CARGO_INFO_ID) TEMP ON TBCI.ID = TEMP.CARGO_INFO_ID JOIN T_BUS_CONTRACT_COMPANY TBCC ON TBCI.COMPANY_ID = TBCC.COMPANY_ID LEFT JOIN T_DIS_SHIPVOYAGE TDS ON TBCI.SHIPVOYAGE_ID = TDS.ID JOIN T_BUS_CONTRACT TBC ON (TBC.STATUS = '20' AND TBCC.CONTRACT_ID = TBC.ID AND TBCI.CARGO_OWNER_ID = TBC.CUSTOMER_ID AND
#{date} >= TBC.START_TIME AND #{date} <= TBC.END_TIME
TO_DATE(TO_CHAR(CASE WHEN TBCI.SHIPVOYAGE_ID IS NOT NULL THEN TDS.BERTH_TIME ELSE TEMP.WEIGH_OUT_DT END, 'yyyy-MM-dd'), 'yyyy-MM-dd') >= TBC.START_TIME AND TO_DATE(TO_CHAR(CASE WHEN TBCI.SHIPVOYAGE_ID IS NOT NULL THEN TDS.BERTH_TIME ELSE TEMP.WEIGH_OUT_DT END, 'yyyy-MM-dd'), 'yyyy-MM-dd') <= TBC.END_TIME
) JOIN T_BUS_CONTRACT_RATE TBCR ON (TBCR.RATE_ITEM_CODE = 'MS00240' AND TBC.ID = TBCR.CONTRACT_ID AND TBCI.CARGO_CODE = TBCR.CARGO_CODE) LEFT JOIN SYS_FILE_BUSINESS SFB ON TBC.ID = SFB.BUSINESS_ID WHERE TBCI.ID = #{cargoInfoId,jdbcType=BIGINT} ORDER BY TBC.CREATE_TIME DESC

SELECT TCSS.ID TCSS_ID, TCSS.COMPANY_ID TCSS_COMPANY_ID, TCSS.COMPANY_NAME TCSS_COMPANY_NAME, TCSS.SHIPVOYAGE_ID TCSS_SHIPVOYAGE_ID, TCSS.SHIPVOYAGE_ITEM_ID TCSS_SHIPVOYAGE_ITEM_ID, TCSS.CARGO_OWNER_ID TCSS_CARGO_OWNER_ID, TCSS.CARGO_OWNER_NAME TCSS_CARGO_OWNER_NAME, TCSS.CARGO_INFO_ID TCSS_CARGO_INFO_ID, TCSS.HANDOVERLIST_ID TCSS_HANDOVERLIST_ID, TCSS.CONTRACT_ID TCSS_CONTRACT_ID, TCSS.CONTRACT_RATE_ID TCSS_CONTRACT_RATE_ID, TCSS.RATE TCSS_RATE, TCSS.TAX TCSS_TAX, TCSS.FREE_STORAGE_DAYS TCSS_FREE_STORAGE_DAYS, TCSS.AMOUNT TCSS_AMOUNT, TCSS.TAX_AMOUNT TCSS_TAX_AMOUNT, TCSS.START_DATE TCSS_START_DATE, TCSS.END_DATE TCSS_END_DATE, TCSS.STATUS TCSS_STATUS, TCSS.REVIEW_BY TCSS_REVIEW_BY, TCSS.REVIEW_BY_NAME TCSS_REVIEW_BY_NAME, TCSS.REVIEW_BY_TIME TCSS_REVIEW_BY_TIME, TCSS.CREATE_BY TCSS_CREATE_BY, TCSS.CREATE_BY_NAME TCSS_CREATE_BY_NAME, TCSS.CREATE_TIME TCSS_CREATE_TIME, TCSS.UPDATE_BY TCSS_UPDATE_BY, TCSS.UPDATE_BY_NAME TCSS_UPDATE_BY_NAME, TCSS.UPDATE_TIME TCSS_UPDATE_TIME, TCSSD.ID TCSSD_ID, TCSSD.STORAGE_SETTLE_ID TCSSD_STORAGE_SETTLE_ID, TCSSD."DATE" TCSSD_DATE, TCSSD.TON TCSSD_TON, TCSSD.BILLABLE_TON TCSSD_BILLABLE_TON, TCSSD.IN_TON TCSSD_IN_TON, TCSSD.OUT_TON TCSSD_OUT_TON, TCSSD.AMOUNT TCSSD_AMOUNT, TCSSD.TAX_AMOUNT TCSSD_TAX_AMOUNT, TBC.CONTACT_NO CONTRACT_NO, DECODE(TCSS.STATUS, '10', '1', TCS.STATUS) "statementStatus", DECODE(TCSS.STATUS, '10', '已结算', DECODE(TCS.STATUS, '30', '计费审核', DECODE(TCS.STATUS, '31', '商务确认', DECODE(TCS.STATUS, '40', '部分开票', DECODE(TCS.STATUS, '50', '已开票', ''))))) "statementStatusLabel" FROM T_COST_STORAGE_SETTLE TCSS JOIN T_COST_STORAGE_SETTLE_DETAIL TCSSD ON TCSS.ID = TCSSD.STORAGE_SETTLE_ID JOIN T_BUS_CONTRACT TBC ON TCSS.CONTRACT_ID = TBC.ID LEFT JOIN T_COST_STATEMENT_DETAIL TCSD ON TCSS.ID = TCSD.BUSINESS_ID LEFT JOIN T_COST_STATEMENT TCS ON TCSD.STATEMENT = TCS.ID WHERE TCSS.CARGO_INFO_ID = #{cargoInfoId,jdbcType=BIGINT} ORDER BY TCSS.CREATE_TIME DESC, TCSSD."DATE"

SELECT ID, CONTRACT_ID, CARGO_CODE, CARGO_NAME, RATE_ITEM_CODE, RATE_ITEM_NAME, TRADE_TYPE, SERVICE_CONTENT_ID, SERVICE_CONTENT_NAME, PAYMENT_TYPE_CODE, PAYMENT_TYPE_NAME, PAYMENT_DAYS, RATE, TAX, UNIT_CODE, UNIT_NAME, CREATE_BY, CREATE_BY_NAME, CREATE_TIME, UPDATE_BY, UPDATE_BY_NAME, UPDATE_TIME, TYPE, RATE_ID, FREE_STORAGE_DAYS, TRATE_ITEM_ID, TRATE_ID, PROCESS_CODE, PROCESS_NAME FROM T_BUS_CONTRACT_RATE WHERE ID = #{contractId,jdbcType=BIGINT}

SELECT ID, CARGO_INFO_ID, REDUCE_TYPE, REDUCE_DAYS, REDUCE_END_DATE, REMARK, CREATE_BY, CREATE_BY_NAME, CREATE_TIME, UPDATE_BY, UPDATE_BY_NAME, UPDATE_TIME FROM T_BUS_STACK_FEE_REDUCE WHERE CARGO_INFO_ID = #{cargoInfoId,jdbcType=BIGINT}
mapper.insert: INSERT INTO T_BUS_STACK_FEE_REDUCE(ID, CARGO_INFO_ID, REDUCE_TYPE, REDUCE_DAYS, REDUCE_END_DATE, REMARK, CREATE_BY, CREATE_BY_NAME, CREATE_TIME, UPDATE_BY, UPDATE_BY_NAME, UPDATE_TIME) VALUES (#{id, jdbcType=BIGINT}, #{cargoInfoId, jdbcType=BIGINT}, #{reduceType, jdbcType=VARCHAR}, #{reduceDays, jdbcType=INTEGER}, #{reduceEndDate, jdbcType=TIMESTAMP}, #{remark, jdbcType=VARCHAR}, #{loginUserId, jdbcType=BIGINT}, #{loginUserName, jdbcType=VARCHAR}, #{now, jdbcType=TIMESTAMP}, #{updateBy, jdbcType=BIGINT}, #{updateByName, jdbcType=VARCHAR}, #{updateTime, jdbcType=TIMESTAMP})
mapper.update:
UPDATE T_BUS_STACK_FEE_REDUCE
ID = #{id, jdbcType=BIGINT},
CARGO_INFO_ID = #{cargoInfoId, jdbcType=BIGINT},
REDUCE_TYPE = #{reduceType, jdbcType=VARCHAR},
REDUCE_DAYS = #{reduceDays, jdbcType=INTEGER},
REDUCE_END_DATE = #{reduceEndDate, jdbcType=TIMESTAMP},
REMARK = #{remark, jdbcType=VARCHAR},
CREATE_BY = #{createBy, jdbcType=BIGINT},
CREATE_BY_NAME = #{createByName, jdbcType=VARCHAR},
CREATE_TIME = #{createTime, jdbcType=TIMESTAMP},
UPDATE_BY = #{loginUserId, jdbcType=BIGINT},
UPDATE_BY_NAME = #{loginUserName, jdbcType=VARCHAR},
UPDATE_TIME = #{now, jdbcType=TIMESTAMP},
WHERE CARGO_INFO_ID = #{cargoInfoId, jdbcType=BIGINT}
